name: Scheduler
description: Schedule agent tasks to run at a specific time or on a recurring cron schedule. Supports one-shot ISO 8601 datetimes and 5/6-field cron expressions.

tools.name: schedule.create
tools.description: Create a scheduled task. 'when' can be an ISO 8601 datetime (one-shot) or a cron expression (recurring). The server will run the specified agent with the given prompt at the scheduled time.
tools.argumentsSchemaJson: {"type":"object","properties":{"name":{"type":"string","description":"Friendly name for this schedule"},"when":{"type":"string","description":"ISO 8601 datetime (e.g. '2025-09-01T09:00:00Z') or cron expression (e.g. '0 9 * * 1')"},"agent_id":{"type":"string","description":"ID of the agent to run"},"prompt":{"type":"string","description":"Prompt/instruction to send to the agent"},"save_result":{"type":"boolean","description":"Save the agent's response as a conversation record"},"email_result":{"type":"boolean","description":"Email the agent's response when done"},"email_to":{"type":"string","description":"Email address to send the result to (overrides default)"}},"required":["name","when","agent_id","prompt"]}

tools.name: schedule.list
tools.description: List all active scheduled tasks for the current user.

tools.name: schedule.cancel
tools.description: Cancel (disable) a scheduled task by its ID or ID prefix.
tools.argumentsSchemaJson: {"type":"object","properties":{"id":{"type":"string","description":"Schedule ID or prefix returned by schedule.create"}},"required":["id"]}

tools.name: schedule.run_now
tools.description: Trigger a scheduled task to run immediately (bypasses the scheduled time).
